You're currently on the results page of your FlowBlinq GEO audit, specifically viewing the "Overview" tab. Here, you can see high-level metrics about your website's AI visibility, including your overall GEO score, competitive intelligence, and the status of your citation scan.

If you have any specific questions about your audit results or need help with recommendations, feel free to ask! I'm here to help you optimize your site's visibility.
